# Foundation Repair Insurance
> Specialized contractor insurance for foundation repair, underpinning, piering, and structural repair businesses nationwide.

## About
Contractors Choice Agency provides tailored insurance for foundation repair contractors. Founded by a former contractor with 20+ years experience, we understand the unique risks: structural liability, soil movement claims, and professional errors.

## Services
- General Liability Insurance
- Professional Liability (E&O)
- Workers' Compensation
- Commercial Auto Insurance
- Equipment & Tools Coverage
- Contractor's Pollution Liability
- Umbrella/Excess Coverage

## Coverage Area
Licensed in all 50 states.
